name: Chili Cheese Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs for 4 to 5 minutes until light.
2. Add flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Mix well.
4. Fold in cheese and chilis.
5. Pour mixture into a greased 9x13x2 inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes.
7. Cut into squares.
8. Serve hot or cold.
